title: MineCozy
description: Cozy minecraft with some adventure elements
body:
A heavily inspired Minecraft modpack from Better Adventures+, made by Flowstate.

I created this modpack to play with my friends or enjoy a good solo night gameplay experience.
However, I know that there are people who will probably enjoy this modpack, so I decided to publish it. I hope you like it! I will try to update it and make it better over time.

**Features**
- Progression system with [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) 
- New biomes thanks to [terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)
- Better world generation with [tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terratonic)
- New structures 
- better villages 
- New foods with [delight mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and it has compability with big mods that i added
- New [Four season](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons) system
- Yung's Better [desert temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples), [dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons), [end island](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-end-island), [jungle temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples), [mineshafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts), [nether fortress](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses), [ocean monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments), [strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds), [witch hunts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-witch-huts) and [bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-bridges)
- [Enhanced deep dark](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) with a new dimension
- [Betternether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [Betterend](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) 
 and more!

I tried to keep it as much vanilla+ as possible but still wanted to add some excitement to the game.

Also, LevelZ has compability with betternether, betterend and deeper and darker items.

Just a reminder: I play on mostly low settings and upload versions with my settings. If you have a more powerful PC, feel free to increase the shader settings, render distance, and other graphics options for a better experience.

if you find any issues you can write me on discord.
Pexer#5544
